text.title: Backstage Developer Portal Deployment Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Backstage rots; plugins break after 2 months.
Catalog drift; nobody trusts ownership data.
antipattern.fix: Add CI gate enforcing catalog-info schema.

antipattern.symptom: Production breaks after a community plugin update.
Docs go stale; PR review can't catch drift.
